ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the subject */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of subject (e.g., student, patient, volunteer) */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for including the subject in the experiment */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for excluding the subject from the experiment */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject gave consent to participate */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Approval status from the ethical review board */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "go_no_go_condition" INTEGER /* Condition of go/no-go response (0 = go, 1 = no-go) */,
  "arrow_presented" INTEGER /* Indicator if an arrow was presented (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the trial */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response corresponds to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject who provided the response */,
  "subject_response" INTEGER /* Subject's response (0 = incorrect, 1 = correct, 2 = no response) */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Time taken by the subject to respond */,
  "trial_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the trial */,
  "trial_start_time" REAL /* Start time of the trial */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Subject's confidence level in their response */,
  "response_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., cognitive, behavioral) */,
  "condition_level" TEXT /* Level of the condition (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "accurate_responses" INTEGER /* Count of accurate responses by the subject */,
  "average_reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time across trials */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials the subject participated in */,
  "incomplete_trials" INTEGER /* Number of incomplete trials */,
  "average_confidence" REAL /* Average confidence level across responses */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment these settings belong to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., trial, experiment) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the setting value (e.g., seconds, trials) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject providing feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the feedback pertains to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the subject (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the subject */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., survey, interview) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_feedback_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trial condition association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition applied during the trial */,
  "condition_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the condition was applied in the trial */,
  "condition_duration" REAL /* Duration of the condition during the trial */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the condition in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
